zh.lifeSummary: 當Walchelin de Ferriers於1136年出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，他的父親Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby37歲，母親Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby36歲。他於1166年之前與Lady Alice de Lechelade在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1201年在以色列מחוז הצפון阿可享年65歲，埋葬在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walchelin de Ferriers于1136年出生在英国德比夏爾德比时，他的父亲Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby37岁，母亲Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby36岁。他于1166年之前与Lady Alice de Lechelade在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1201年在以色列מחוז הצפון阿可享年65岁，埋葬在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferriers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Americo, Armando, Augusto, Carlos, Ferando, Jacinto, Jaime, Luiz, Manuel, Marta, Pedro.  Italian Antonio, Antonietta, Marcello, Silvio.
Italian (southern): variant of   Ferrera  , itself a variant of   Ferrara  .
Portuguese and Hispanic: variant of   Ferreira  .

variants.name: Ferrera
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Manuel, Rafael, Augusto, Francisco, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramona, Ricardo.  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Biagio, Domenic, Sal, Aldo, Angelo, Attilio, Carmelo, Elio, Enrico.
Italian: habitational name from Ferrera Cenisio (now Moncenisio) in Piedmont, or Ferrera di Varese and Ferrera Erbognone, both in Lombardy.

en.lifeSummary: When Walchelin de Ferriers was born in 1136, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, his father, Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby, was 36. He married Lady Alice de Lechelade before 1166, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1201, in Akko, Northern, Israel, at the age of 65, and was buried in Jerusalem, Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walchelin de Ferriers est né en 1136, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Lechelade avant 1166, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1201, à Akko, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Jerusalem, Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walchelin de Ferriers 1136 in Derby, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby 36. Er hat vor 1166 in England, United Kingdom Lady Alice de Lechelade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1201 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Akko, Northern, Israel und wurde in Jerusalem, Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walchelin de Ferriers è nato il nel 1136 nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Lechelade prima del 1166, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1201, nel Akko, Northern, Israele, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Jerusalem, Palestina.

ja.lifeSummary: Walchelin de Ferriersが1136年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derbyは37歳，母Margaret Peverell Countess of Derbyは36歳であった。1166年以前にイギリスイギリスでLady Alice de Lecheladeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1201年にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןアクコで65歳で死去し，パレスチナジャーウサレムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walchelin de Ferriers(이)가 1136년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1166년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Alice de Lechelade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1201년 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון 왁오에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 팔레스타인 제루사렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walchelin de Ferriers nasceu em 1136, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Lechelade antes 1166, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1201, em Akko, Northern, Israel, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Jerusalem, Palestina.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walchelin de Ferriers родился в 1136 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Lechelade перед 1166 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1201 г. в местности акко, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности джирсеилем, Палестина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walchelin de Ferriers nació en 1136, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ferrers 2nd Earl of Derby, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Peverell Countess of Derby, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Alice de Lechelade antes de 1166, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1201, en Akko, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Jerusalem, Palestina.
